Video.summary: Tyrone claims his ex wife Tania got him falsely arrested 3 times so he's here to sue her for $3,000.
Video.title: Reformed Pimp Sues His Madam

Video.summary: A man and his wife petition the court for a paternity test because they believe the defendant may be the man's daughter.
Video.title: Long Lost Daughter?

Video.summary: Alisha is being sued by her step father, but says she owes him nothing after he put her in foster care.
Video.title: Coping with Family Chaos

Video.summary: Shaneequa loved her precious pooch but when she could no longer care for her she found a friend that could.
Video.title: Screwing the Pooch

Video.summary: Comedian Allan Cunningham is suing his former fan for the money she owes him for a private party.
Video.title: Heckling the Plaintiff

Video.summary: Deputy Campora arrests two men in possession of drugs and with felony warrants. Deputies Brady and Ford enforce a restraining order.
Video.title: What Bump in My Pants?

Video.summary: Deputy Miller gets physical with an aggressive transient. Deputy Turnbull demonstrates an exercise in mental gymnastics.
Video.title: Hostile & Homeless

Video.summary: Natheefa sues her brother Clifford, accusing him of stealing her 55" TV and owing $4,750 in rent after abruptly moving out. Clifford claims he left due to household tensions and took his own belongings.
Video.title: My Brother Stole My TV

Video.summary: A shocking witness and the results of a DNA test determine the future of Mafi and Athena's tumultuous relationship.
Video.title: Knighton vs. Carrillo

Video.summary: Several stolen wigs and one wrecked car have a Mississippi couple standing before the judges.
Video.title: Merriweather vs. Kimmons

Video.summary: A man says his ex vandalized his van, and while they were dating, she punched him in the face and ended up in jail.
Video.title: Trading Punches

Video.summary: Friends Matt and James said everything was ok until their other roommate, David, turned into Goliath and became a violent religious fanatic, slinging shoes and punching faces.
Video.title: The Christian Crusader

Video.summary: A woman sues a former friend after bailing him out of jail.
Video.title: Cop Out on the Buddhist Bail-Out and Roommate Food Feud!

Image.alt: Cop Out on the Buddhist Bail-Out and Roommate Food Feud!
Cop Out on the Buddhist Bail-Out and Roommate Food Feud!
Cop Out on the Buddhist Bail-Out and Roommate Food Feud!

Video.summary: First, these cousins clash over cash then they spar over cars and finally they moan over loans.
Video.title: Clash of the Cousins

Video.summary: Eleanor believes that the defendant may be the daughter of her brother, who has been deceased for 18 years.
Video.title: Trying to Make It Official

Video.summary: An uncooperative felon tests the patience of the SED.
Video.title: Special Enforcement Detail Work

Video.summary: Deputies Payne and Miller apprehend a burglar under the influence at an animal hospital. The SED conducts a probation check on a known flop house.
Video.title: I Broke into the Vet's Office to Get a Pack of Cigarettes

Image.alt: I Broke into the Vet's Office to Get a Pack of Cigarettes
I Broke into the Vet's Office to Get a Pack of Cigarettes
I Broke into the Vet's Office to Get a Pack of Cigarettes

Video.summary: The Western El Dorado Narcotics Enforcement Team shines a light on the destruction of our public land by illegal commercial Mexican cartel grows.
Video.title: Marijuana vs. the Environment

Video.summary: Deputy Fontana responds to an overturned vehicle. An intoxicated driver is found sleeping behind the wheel of his vehicle.
Video.title: Just Another Day in the Life of a Deputy

Image.alt: Just Another Day in the Life of a Deputy
Just Another Day in the Life of a Deputy
Just Another Day in the Life of a Deputy

Video.summary: Deputy Payne shows us a typical day for the life of a deputy in El Dorado County.
Video.title: All in A Night's Patrol

Video.summary: A couple get into an argument after Deputy Katz makes a felony arrest. Deputy Dacanay responds to a man attempting to break into a neighbor's home with a shovel.
Video.title: Unhappy Wife, Unhappy Life

Video.summary: Christopher is suing his brother Ashlee for punches his tooth out over some spilled juice.
Video.title: My House My Couch

Video.summary: Darious claims his cousin barged into his car, got caught speeding, borrowed money to go to clubs, and more.
Video.title: On The Road

Video.summary: Melvin is suing a real estate broker for a bogus electric bill and lost rent, claiming she stole his identity to pay her bills. Jacqueline catogorically denies any of Melvin outrageous claims.
Video.title: Buyers are Liars

Video.summary: Ronald and Rhonda let a kitchen renovation bring out the worst in eachother.
Video.title: Relationship Renovations

Video.summary: Judy is suing her niece for 12 months of unpaid rent. Cassandra says there was never a deal to pay any rent.
Video.title: Unconditional Rent

Video.summary: Crystal sues her ex-friend Claudia for $800, claiming she used her cruise payment for another guest after Crystal canceled due to her son’s accident. Claudia countersues for $1,000, alleging harassment and car damage.
Video.title: Cruise Catastrophe

Video.summary: Desherica Smith claims her mother owes her for covering food and bills while she lived there and insists she doesn’t owe rent. Shocked her mom is suing, she feels the case is petty. Desherica believes they’re even and expects to win.
Video.title: Mother/Daughter Courtroom Drama

Video.summary: Karen Steinhaus sues landscaper Don for $1,500, claiming he took her money but never completed yard work or removed a tree. Don, with 35 years of experience, counters that he did most of the job and delays were weather-related.
Video.title: Tree-Trimming Turmoil

Video.summary: Christopher Shaw sues tenant La'Shaunda Harris for $700, accusing her of being a professional rent scammer. La'Shaunda countersues for $657.65, claiming he’s a terrible landlord.
Video.title: Riot Over the Internet

Video.summary: Antoine Grice sues landlord Nicholas Renzi for $868, claiming the apartment was unlivable and his security deposit was unfairly withheld. Renzi counters that Antoine was a troublesome tenant who overstayed.
Video.title: Lousy Landlording

Video.summary: Antoine Grice sues landlord Nicholas Renzi for $868, claiming the apartment was unlivable and his security deposit was unfairly withheld. Renzi counters that Antoine was a troublesome tenant who overstayed.
Video.title: Lousy Landlording

Video.summary: Malika Jules claims Shamika Chambers' son broke her iPad at her salon, costing $385 to replace. Shamika denies responsibility, saying all kids were playing together, and insists there's no proof her son caused the damage.
Video.title: Your Son Broke My Daughter's iPad

Image.alt: Your Son Broke My Daughter's iPad
Your Son Broke My Daughter's iPad
Your Son Broke My Daughter's iPad

Video.summary: A couple say they bought a trailer from their neighbor, but he never gave it to them; he says they called the police and made death threats against him, so he's counter-suing for harassment.
Video.title: Trailer Troubles

Video.summary: Raven says her friend started hooking up with her ex while they were in Las Vegas, so she's suing for the trip
Video.title: What Happens in Vegas Doesn’t Stay in Vegas

Image.alt: What Happens in Vegas Doesn’t Stay in Vegas
What Happens in Vegas Doesn’t Stay in Vegas
What Happens in Vegas Doesn’t Stay in Vegas

Video.summary: A woman says the defendant began cheating on her after she got pregnant with his child; she sues him for unpaid child support; the defendant claims he has fallen on hard times since the pandemic.
Video.title: Broken Promises, Unpaid Dues

Video.summary: A woman sues her ex-boyfriend for rent and emotional distress because he cheated on her with their roommate.
Video.title: The Roommate Affair

Video.summary: Calvin must take a polygraph test after his girlfriend, Johnecia, accuses him of keeping their relationship a secret.
Video.title: Tate vs. Glass

Video.summary: Benjamin petitions for a paternity test after his girlfriend, Kenetha, told him during an argument that he is not the father.
Video.title: Brogdon vs. Jenkins

Video.summary: A stolen car and four slashed tires have exes Tiffany and Jonathan arguing in court over who is at fault.
Video.title: Martin vs. Polite

Video.summary: A shocking twist ending determines the future of Latiana and Wynton's rocky nine-year relationship.
Video.title: Weaver vs. Greene

Video.summary: A DNA test, a relationship on the edge and an ultimatum that could change everything put a young couple's future on the line.
Video.title: Wright vs. Flanagan

Video.summary: Pablo’s got jokes, but Joanna isn’t laughing. They bring their issues to the Cutlers for help saving their marriage.
Video.title: Aleman vs Aleman

Video.summary: Erica is bringing Isaiah to court under allegations of stealing money intended for medical purposes to rent a party bus.
Video.title: Hendrickson vs. Bennett

Video.summary: Imani fights for proof of paternity when Dontel refuses responsibility, demanding DNA before committing to their 1-year-old son.
Video.title: Fann vs. Coleman

Video.summary: A six-year marriage is on the brink of divorce as Quincy sues husband Jeron for failing to pay the bills.
Video.title: King vs. Johnson
